commit_message:
feat: add production server + Dockerfile for Cloud Run

server.mjs serves dist/ static files and proxies /api/generate
via Gemini REST API (GEMINI_API_KEY env var) or falls back to
local CLI for dev. Dockerfile does multi-stage build.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
diff:
diff --git a/server.mjs b/server.mjs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..a5f8913
--- /dev/null
+++ b/server.mjs
@@ -0,0 +1,171 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env node
+// Production server: serves dist/ static files + /api/generate via Gemini REST API
+// Falls back to local CLI when GEMINI_API_KEY is not set (dev mode)
+
+import http from 'http'
+import fs from 'fs'
+import path from 'path'
+import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'
+import { spawn } from 'child_process'
+
+const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url))
+const PORT = parseInt(process.env.PORT || '8080', 10)
+const GEMINI_API_KEY = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY || ''
+const DIST_DIR = path.join(__dirname, 'dist')
+
+const MIME = {
+  '.html': 'text/html',
+  '.js':   'application/javascript',
+  '.css':  'text/css',
+  '.svg':  'image/svg+xml',
+  '.png':  'image/png',
+  '.ico':  'image/x-icon',
+  '.json': 'application/json',
+  '.woff2': 'font/woff2',
+  '.woff': 'font/woff',
+}
+
+async function handleGenerate(req, res) {
+  let body = ''
+  req.on('data', c => { body += c })
+  await new Promise(r => req.on('end', r))
+
+  let systemPrompt = '', userMessage = '', provider = 'gemini'
+  try {
+    const p = JSON.parse(body)
+    systemPrompt = p.systemPrompt ?? ''
+    userMessage  = p.userMessage  ?? ''
+    provider     = p.provider     ?? 'gemini'
+  } catch {
+    res.writeHead(400); res.end('Bad JSON'); return
+  }
+
+  const fullPrompt = systemPrompt ? `${systemPrompt}\n\n${userMessage}` : userMessage
+
+  res.writeHead(200, {
+    'Content-Type':    'text/event-stream',
+    'Cache-Control':   'no-cache, no-transform',
+    'Connection':      'keep-alive',
+    'X-Accel-Buffering': 'no',
+  })
+
+  if (GEMINI_API_KEY) {
+    await streamGeminiAPI(fullPrompt, res)
+  } else {
+    await streamCLI(provider, fullPrompt, res)
+  }
+}
+
+async function streamGeminiAPI(prompt, res) {
+  const model = 'gemini-2.0-flash'
+  const url = `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/${model}:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse&key=${GEMINI_API_KEY}`
+
+  const body = JSON.stringify({
+    contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: prompt }] }],
+    generationConfig: { maxOutputTokens: 8192 },
+  })
+
+  try {
+    const { default: https } = await import('https')
+    const urlObj = new URL(url)
+    const options = {
+      hostname: urlObj.hostname,
+      path:     urlObj.pathname + urlObj.search,
+      method:   'POST',
+      headers:  { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(body) },
+    }
+
+    await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
+      const apiReq = https.request(options, apiRes => {
+        let buf = ''
+        apiRes.on('data', chunk => {
+          buf += chunk.toString()
+          const lines = buf.split('\n')
+          buf = lines.pop() ?? ''
+          for (const line of lines) {
+            if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue
+            const data = line.slice(6).trim()
+            if (data === '[DONE]') continue
+            try {
+              const parsed = JSON.parse(data)
+              const text = parsed?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text
+              if (text) res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ text })}\n\n`)
+            } catch { /* ignore */ }
+          }
+        })
+        apiRes.on('end', () => { res.write('data: [DONE]\n\n'); res.end(); resolve(undefined) })
+        apiRes.on('error', reject)
+      })
+      apiReq.on('error', reject)
+      apiReq.write(body)
+      apiReq.end()
+    })
+  } catch (err) {
+    console.error('[server] Gemini API error:', err.message)
+    res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ error: err.message })}\n\n`)
+    res.write('data: [DONE]\n\n')
+    res.end()
+  }
+}
+
+function streamCLI(provider, fullPrompt, res) {
+  return new Promise(resolve => {
+    const isCodex = provider === 'codex'
+    const cmd  = isCodex ? 'codex' : 'gemini'
+    const args = isCodex ? ['exec', fullPrompt] : ['-p', '-']
+
+    console.log(`[server] CLI mode: spawning ${cmd}`)
+    const child = spawn(cmd, args, { env: { ...process.env } })
+    if (!isCodex) { child.stdin.write(fullPrompt); child.stdin.end() }
+
+    child.stdout.on('data', chunk => res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ text: chunk.toString() })}\n\n`))
+    child.stderr.on('data', chunk => {
+      const msg = chunk.toString()
+      if (!msg.includes('cached credentials') && !msg.includes('Loaded')) {
+        console.error(`[server] ${cmd} stderr:`, msg.trim())
+      }
+    })
+    child.on('close', () => { res.write('data: [DONE]\n\n'); res.end(); resolve(undefined) })
+    child.on('error', err => {
+      res.write(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ error: err.message })}\n\n`)
+      res.write('data: [DONE]\n\n')
+      res.end()
+      resolve(undefined)
+    })
+    req?.socket?.on('close', () => { if (!child.killed) child.kill() })
+  })
+}
+
+function serveStatic(req, res) {
+  let urlPath = req.url.split('?')[0]
+  if (urlPath === '/') urlPath = '/index.html'
+
+  let filePath = path.join(DIST_DIR, urlPath)
+  if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
+    // SPA fallback
+    filePath = path.join(DIST_DIR, 'index.html')
+  }
+
+  const ext  = path.extname(filePath)
+  const mime = MIME[ext] || 'application/octet-stream'
+  const data = fs.readFileSync(filePath)
+  res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': mime })
+  res.end(data)
+}
+
+const server = http.createServer((req, res) => {
+  if (req.method === 'POST' && req.url === '/api/generate') {
+    handleGenerate(req, res).catch(err => {
+      console.error('[server] unhandled error:', err)
+      if (!res.headersSent) { res.writeHead(500); res.end('Internal error') }
+    })
+  } else if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
+    res.writeHead(204); res.end()
+  } else {
+    try { serveStatic(req, res) } catch (err) {
+      res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found')
+    }
+  }
+})
+
+server.listen(PORT, () => console.log(`[server] listening on :${PORT} (${GEMINI_API_KEY ? 'Gemini API' : 'CLI'} mode)`))
prompt: "Set up a production server in `server.mjs` using Node.js to serve static files from the `dist/` directory and handle `/api/generate` requests. Integrate the Gemini REST API for request handling when the `GEMINI_API_KEY` environment variable is set, and fall back to a local CLI in development mode. Additionally, create a `Dockerfile` with a multi-stage build process to deploy the application on Google Cloud Run."

commit_message:
fix: Improve sales report date validation and cash calculation accuracy

- Add dynamic date range validation for sales reports
  * Users can only add reports from day after last report to today
  * Applies to both Add Sales form and Review/Approval modal
  * Considers both approved and pending sales when determining last report date

- Disable date editing in Review & Approval modal
  * Prevents admins from changing user-submitted dates during review
  * Added visual feedback (gray background, disabled state)

- Fix date display timezone issues in approval modal
  * Resolve off-by-one day error in approval form date input
  * Convert UTC dates to local timezone correctly

- Fix cash collected calculation in review form
  * Deduct daily expenses from cash collected total
  * Formula: cashCollected = cashSales + creditTakenCash + miscCash - totalExpenses

- Fix balance allocation calculations
  * Remove incorrect double-subtraction of credit given
  * Update formula display to show complete breakdown
  * Display: Cash Collected + UPI (includes credit collected, misc, expenses)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
prompt: Update the sales reporting functionality to improve date validation and calculation accuracy. Ensure that the date range for adding sales reports is dynamically validated, allowing only dates from the day after the last report to today, and apply this logic to both the Add Sales form and the Review/Approval modal. Disable date editing in the Review & Approval modal and provide visual feedback for the disabled state. Fix timezone discrepancies in the approval modal to correctly display dates in the local timezone. Update cash collected and balance allocation calculations in the backend to ensure accurate totals, incorporating daily expenses and correcting any double-subtraction issues. Modify the following files: `backend/src/controllers/salesController.js`, `backend/src/models/data.js`, `frontend/src/components/admin/SalesReportTab.js`, and `frontend/src/pages/AddSales.js`. The project uses JavaScript.

commit_message:
fix: Fix credit given/taken data flow and add separate credit_taken column

Major fixes to credit handling in sales system:

Backend Changes:
- Add credit_taken column to sales table (JSONB)
- Update createSale to save credit_taken separately from credit
- Update getAllSales/getSale to return credit_taken from sales table
- Fix approveSale to process credit_taken from sales.credit_taken
- Add extensive logging for debugging credit data flow

Frontend Changes:
- Fix critical UUID handling bug: remove parseInt() conversions
  * Credit holder IDs are UUIDs, not integers
  * parseInt() was corrupting UUIDs (e.g., "2e07..." became 2)
  * parseInt() was causing NaN for UUIDs starting with letters
- Add extensive console logging to trace data flow
- Fix approval form dropdown comparisons (use == instead of ===)
- Update SalesReportTab to load credit_taken from correct source

Key Bug Fixes:
- Credit given showing as null: UUIDs were being corrupted by parseInt
- Only 1 credit taken saving: Second entry with UUID starting with letter
  returned NaN from parseInt and was filtered out

Add credit collection history tracking on sale approval

- Add decrementCreditHolderOutstanding function to data.js for processing credit taken
- Update approveSale in salesController.js to process credit taken and daily expenses
- Credit given creates history with transactionType 'given' and collectionType 'regular'
- Credit taken creates history with transactionType 'collected' and collectionType 'collected_on_shop'
- Daily expenses are saved to daily_expenses table linked to the sale
- Both credit operations properly update outstanding amounts and record transaction history
